test-method.name: testHomePageLoads
test-method.description: Verify home page loads successfully

test-method.name: testNavigateToLogin
test-method.description: Verify navigation to Login page

test-method.name: testNavigateToRegister
test-method.description: Verify navigation to Register page

test-method.name: testBrowserBackNavigation
test-method.description: Verify browser back navigation

test-method.name: testPageRefresh
test-method.description: Verify page refresh

test-method.name: testValidRegistration
test-method.description: TC_REG_001: Register with valid credentials

test-method.name: testValidLogin
test-method.description: TC_LOGIN_001: Login with valid credentials

exception.message: Should redirect away from login. Current URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Should redirect away from login. Current URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at test-method.name: testLogoutRedirectsToLogin
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_001: Logout via profile menu redirects to /login

exception.message: Logout action should be triggerable — logout menu item not found expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: testLoginLinkAppearsAfterLogout
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_002: Login link is visible in nav after logout

exception.message: Login or Register link should appear in the nav after logout expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: testLocalStorageTokensClearedAfterLogout

test-method.name: testUserAvatarGoneAfterLogout
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_005: User profile avatar/icon is gone after logout

test-method.name: testSessionDoesNotPersistAfterLogout
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_006: Session does not persist — re-login required

exception.message: After logout, /profile should redirect to login (session must not persist) expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: After logout, /profile should redirect to login (session must not persist) expected [true] but found [false] at test-method.name: testProfileRouteGuardedWhenNotLoggedIn
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_007: /profile route redirects to login when not logged in

exception.message: /profile should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Landed on: https://ekartms.netlify.app/profile expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: /profile should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. test-method.name: testOrdersRouteGuardedWhenNotLoggedIn
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_008: /orders route redirects to login when not logged in

exception.message: /orders should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Landed on: https://ekartms.netlify.app/orders expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: /orders should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. test-method.name: testSessionPersistsAcrossRefresh
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_010: Logged-in session persists across page refresh

exception.message: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testSessionPersistsAcrossRefresh(LogoutTest.java:257) at test-method.name: testLogoutIdempotent
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_011: Calling logout when already logged out doesn't error

exception.message: After first logout should be on login page expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: After first logout should be on login page expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testLogoutIdempotent(LogoutTest.java:281) at test-method.name: testBackButtonAfterLogoutDoesNotRestoreSession
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_012: Browser back button after logout doesn't restore session

test-method.name: testFullLoginLogoutLoginCycle
test-method.description: TC_LOGOUT_013: Full login → logout → login cycle works correctly

exception.message: Should be past /login after first login. URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Should be past /login after first login. URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at
